scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,market,risk,broker,review,backtest,stratlab -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red,white,gray "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:market-data" "npm run dev:risk-engine" "npm run dev:broker-router" "npm run dev:review-loop" "npm run dev:backtest" "npm run dev:strategy-lab"
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @hermes/contracts && npm run check --workspace @hermes/infra && npm run check --workspace @hermes/logger && npm run check --workspace @hermes/api && npm run check --workspace @hermes/market-data && npm run check --workspace @hermes/risk-engine && npm run check --workspace @hermes/broker-router && npm run check --workspace @hermes/review-loop && npm run check --workspace @hermes/backtest && npm run check --workspace @hermes/strategy-lab && npm run check --workspace @hermes/web
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api,market,risk,broker,review,backtest,stratlab,cfo -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red,white,gray "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:market-data" "npm run dev:risk-engine" "npm run dev:broker-router" "npm run dev:review-loop" "npm run dev:backtest" "npm run dev:strategy-lab" "npm run dev:cfo"
